migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_cto_option_family (family_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_cto_option (option_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, family_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_cto_rule (rule_code VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY, rule_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, finish_code VARCHAR(32), sensor_code VARCHAR(32), message VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_cto_configuration (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, options_json TEXT NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option_family (family_code, display_name) SELECT 'finish', 'Finish' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option_family WHERE family_code = 'finish'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option_family (family_code, display_name) SELECT 'sensor', 'Sensor' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option_family WHERE family_code = 'sensor'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option (option_code, family_code, display_name) SELECT 'FINISH-MATTE', 'finish', 'Matte finish' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option WHERE option_code = 'FINISH-MATTE'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option (option_code, family_code, display_name) SELECT 'FINISH-GLOSS', 'finish', 'Gloss finish' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option WHERE option_code = 'FINISH-GLOSS'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option (option_code, family_code, display_name) SELECT 'SENSOR-BASIC', 'sensor', 'Basic sensor' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option WHERE option_code = 'SENSOR-BASIC'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_option (option_code, family_code, display_name) SELECT 'SENSOR-VISION', 'sensor', 'Vision sensor' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_option WHERE option_code = 'SENSOR-VISION'); INSERT INTO mes_cto_rule (rule_code, rule_type, finish_code, sensor_code, message) SELECT 'RULE-MATTE-VISION-INCOMPATIBLE', 'incompatible', 'FINISH-MATTE', 'SENSOR-VISION', 'Matte finish is not compatible with the vision sensor' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_rule WHERE rule_code = 'RULE-MATTE-VISION-INCOMPATIBLE');

objects.name: mes-cto-hub
objects.description: Configure-to-order validation and build draft hub

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT f.family_code AS family_code, f.display_name AS family_name, o.option_code AS option_code, o.display_name AS option_name FROM mes_cto_option_family f JOIN mes_cto_option o ON o.family_code = f.family_code ORDER BY f.family_code, o.option_code"},{"type":"map","var":"options","source":"${rows}","fields":{"familyCode":"${item.family_code}","familyName":"${item.family_name}","optionCode":"${item.option_code}","optionName":"${item.option_name}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${options}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"setVar","var":"finishCode","value":"${input.finishCode}"},{"type":"setVar","var":"sensorCode","value":"${input.sensorCode}"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"invalid","sql":"SELECT rule_code, message FROM mes_cto_rule WHERE rule_type = 'incompatible' AND finish_code = ? AND sensor_code = ?","params":["${finishCode}","${sensorCode}"]},{"type":"if","var":"invalid","notNull":true,"then":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"messages","sql":"SELECT message FROM mes_cto_rule WHERE rule_code = ?","params":["${invalid.rule_code}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION_FAILED","error_message":"${invalid.message}","messages":"${messages}"}}]},{"type":"selectMany","var":"messages","sql":"SELECT message FROM mes_cto_rule WHERE 1 = 0"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","messages":"${messages}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"setVar","var":"finishCode","value":"${input.finishCode}"},{"type":"setVar","var":"sensorCode","value":"${input.sensorCode}"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"invalid","sql":"SELECT rule_code, message FROM mes_cto_rule WHERE rule_type = 'incompatible' AND finish_code = ? AND sensor_code = ?","params":["${finishCode}","${sensorCode}"]},{"type":"if","var":"invalid","notNull":true,"then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION_FAILED","error_message":"${invalid.message}","configurationId":"","materialCode":"","workOrderDraftId":"","bomHint":"","status":"rejected"}}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"payload","sql":"SELECT CONCAT('{\"finishCode\":\"', ?, '\",\"sensorCode\":\"', ?, '\"}') AS options_json","params":["${finishCode}","${sensorCode}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_cto_configuration (id, options_json, status) SELECT '22300000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', ?, 'draft' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_cto_configuration WHERE id = '22300000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001')","params":["${payload.options_json}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"configuration","sql":"SELECT id, options_json, status FROM mes_cto_configuration WHERE id = '22300000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","configurationId":"${configuration.id}","materialCode":"MAT-WIDGET-A01","workOrderDraftId":"WO-DRAFT-CTO-A01","bomHint":"Use MAT-WIDGET-A01 base BoM with selected finish and sensor options","status":"${configuration.status}"}}]}

dashboards.title: MES CTO Configurator
dashboards.layoutJson:
{"columns":84,"rowHeight":8,"widgets":[{"id":"options","type":"function","title":"Options","x":0,"y":0,"w":28,"h":21,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.mes-cto-hub","functionName":"mes_cto_listOptions","buttonLabel":"List options"},{"id":"validate","type":"function-form","title":"Validate configuration","x":28,"y":0,"w":28,"h":28,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.mes-cto-hub","functionName":"mes_cto_validateConfig","buttonLabel":"Validate","fieldsJson":"[{\"name\":\"finishCode\",\"label\":\"Finish\",\"type\":\"text\",\"defaultValue\":\"FINISH-GLOSS\"},{\"name\":\"sensorCode\",\"label\":\"Sensor\",\"type\":\"text\",\"defaultValue\":\"SENSOR-VISION\"}]"},{"id":"generate","type":"function-form","title":"Generate build","x":56,"y":0,"w":28,"h":28,"objectPath":"root.platform.devices.mes-cto-hub","functionName":"mes_cto_generateBuild","buttonLabel":"Generate","fieldsJson":"[{\"name\":\"finishCode\",\"label\":\"Finish\",\"type\":\"text\",\"defaultValue\":\"FINISH-GLOSS\"},{\"name\":\"sensorCode\",\"label\":\"Sensor\",\"type\":\"text\",\"defaultValue\":\"SENSOR-VISION\"}]"},{"id":"help","type":"html-snippet","title":"Hint","x":0,"y":28,"w":84,"h":14,"htmlJson":"

Seed options: FINISH-GLOSS, FINISH-MATTE, SENSOR-BASIC, SENSOR-VISION. Incompatibility rule: matte finish with vision sensor.

"}]}

metadata.changelog: 1.0.0 — BL-223 CTO configurator pattern: options, compatibility validation, and build draft generation
